infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Pepta uses your camera to scan meals and capture progress photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pepta uses your photo library so you can upload progress photos and meal images.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Pepta uses your microphone so you can log meals by voice.
